parameters.query:
-- Find rollback candidates: snapshots older than threshold, not yet triggered
SELECT rs.id AS snapshot_id, rs.ad_id, rs.snapshot_bid, rs.snapshot_cpl, rs.snapshot_ctr,
       rs.rollback_threshold_hours, rs.created_at,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - rs.created_at)) / 3600 AS hours_since_change
FROM bid_rollback_snapshots rs
WHERE rs.rollback_triggered = FALSE
  AND rs.created_at < NOW() - (rs.rollback_threshold_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
  AND rs.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY rs.created_at ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors
FROM leads
WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY param5

-- Mark snapshot as rollback triggered
UPDATE bid_rollback_snapshots SET
  rollback_triggered = TRUE,
  checked_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.snapshot_id }};

-- Log rollback in bid_history
INSERT INTO bid_history (ad_id, old_bid, new_bid, reason, rule_applied, clicks_at_change)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  0,
  {{ $json.rollback_bid }},
  'ROLLBACK: {{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}',
  'ROLLBACK',
  0
);

-- Log state transition
INSERT INTO teaser_state_log (ad_id, old_state, new_state, reason, triggered_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  'active',
  'active',
  'ROLLBACK: {{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 150) }}',
  'rollback_engine'
);

-- Just mark as checked (no rollback needed)
UPDATE bid_rollback_snapshots SET
  rollback_triggered = FALSE,
  checked_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.snapshot_id }};
